items.title_zh: 人工智能芯片公司 Kandou AI 在从消费硬件转向人工智能基础设施后，以 4 亿美元的估值从软银、新思科技等公司筹集了 2.25 亿美元（Nino Paoli/彭博社）

items.title: Even the most advanced AI models fail more often than you think on structured outputs — raising doubts about the effectiveness of coding assistants

items.title_en: Even the most advanced AI models fail more often than you think on structured outputs — raising doubts about the effectiveness of coding assistants
items.title_zh: 即使是最先进的人工智能模型在结构化输出上失败的次数也比你想象的要多——这引发了人们对编码助手有效性的怀疑
